en: Jesus left the temple and was going away, when his disciples came to point out to him the buildings of the temple.
zh: 耶穌出了聖殿，往前走的時候，門徒前來把聖殿的建築指給他看。

en: But he answered them, "You see all these, do you not? Truly, I say to you, there will not be left here one stone upon another that will not be thrown down."
zh: 他對門徒說：“你們不是看見了這一切嗎？我實在告訴你們，將來在這裡必沒有一塊石頭留在另一塊石頭上面，每一塊都要拆下來。”

en: As he sat on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to him privately, saying, "Tell us, when will these things be, and what will be the sign of your coming and of the close of the age?"
zh: 耶穌坐在橄欖山上，門徒暗中前來問他：“請告訴我們，甚麼時候會有這些事呢？你的降臨和這世代的終結，有甚麼預兆呢？”

en: And Jesus answered them, "See that no one leads you astray.
zh: 耶穌回答他們：“你們要小心，不要被人迷惑；

en: For many will come in my name, saying, 'I am the Christ,' and they will lead many astray.
zh: 因為許多人要假冒我的名而來，說：‘我就是基督’，並且要迷惑許多的人。

en: And you will hear of wars and rumors of wars. See that you are not alarmed, for this must take place, but the end is not yet.
zh: 你們要聽見戰爭，也聽見戰爭的風聲；你們要小心，不要驚慌，因為這是免不了的，不過結局還沒有到。

en: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom, and there will be famines and earthquakes in various places.
zh: 一個民族要起來攻打另一個民族，一個國家要起來攻打另一個國家，到處都有饑荒和地震，

en: All these are but the beginning of the birth pains.
zh: 這一切不過是痛苦的開始。

en: "Then they will deliver you up to tribulation and put you to death, and you will be hated by all nations for my name's sake.
zh: 那時人要把你們送去受苦，也要殺害你們，你們要因我的名被萬民恨惡。

en: And then many will fall away and betray one another and hate one another.
zh: 那時許多人會失去信仰，彼此出賣，互相恨惡；

en: And many false prophets will arise and lead many astray.
zh: 也有許多假先知出現，要迷惑許多人。

en: And because lawlessness will be increased, the love of many will grow cold.
zh: 因為不法的事增加，許多人的愛心就冷淡了。

en: But the one who endures to the end will be saved.
zh: 唯有堅忍到底的，必然得救。

en: And this gospel of the kingdom will be proclaimed throughout the whole world as a testimony to all nations, and then the end will come.
zh: 這天國的福音要傳遍天下，向萬民作見證，然後結局才來到。

en: "So when you see the abomination of desolation spoken of by the prophet Daniel, standing in the holy place (let the reader understand),
zh: “當你們看見但以理先知所說的‘那造成荒涼的可憎者’，站在聖地的時候 ，

en: then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains.
zh: 那時，住在猶太的應當逃到山上；

en: Let the one who is on the housetop not go down to take what is in his house,
zh: 在房頂的不要下來拿家裡的東西；

en: and let the one who is in the field not turn back to take his cloak.
zh: 在田裡的也不要回去取衣服。

en: And alas for women who are pregnant and for those who are nursing infants in those days!
zh: 當那些日子，懷孕的和乳養孩子的有禍了！

en: Pray that your flight may not be in winter or on a Sabbath.
zh: 你們應當祈求，叫你們逃難的時候，不是在冬天或安息日，

en: For then there will be great tribulation, such as has not been from the beginning of the world until now, no, and never will be.
zh: 因為那時必有大災難，這是從世界的開始到現在未曾有過的，以後也必不會再有。

en: And if those days had not been cut short, no human being would be saved. But for the sake of the elect those days will be cut short.
zh: 如果那些日子不減少，沒有一個人可以存活；但是為了選民，那些日子必會減少。

en: Then if anyone says to you, 'Look, here is the Christ!' or 'There he is!' do not believe it.
zh: 那時，如果有人對你們說：‘看哪，基督在這裡！’或說：‘他在那裡！’你們不要信，

en: For false christs and false prophets will arise and perform great signs and wonders, so as to lead astray, if possible, even the elect.
zh: 因為必有假基督和假先知出現，顯大神蹟和奇事；如果可以的話，他們連選民也要迷惑。

en: See, I have told you beforehand.
zh: 你們看！我已經事先告訴你們了。

en: So, if they say to you, 'Look, he is in the wilderness,' do not go out. If they say, 'Look, he is in the inner rooms,' do not believe it.
zh: 如果他們對你們說：‘看！基督在曠野裡。’你們不要出去；或說：‘看！他在內室裡。’也不要相信。

en: For as the lightning comes from the east and shines as far as the west, so will be the coming of the Son of Man.
zh: 電光怎樣從東方閃出來，一直照到西方，人子降臨的時候，也是這樣。

en: Wherever the corpse is, there the vultures will gather.
zh: 屍首在哪裡，鷹也必聚在哪裡。

en: "Immediately after the tribulation of those days the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light, and the stars will fall from heaven, and the powers of the heavens will be shaken.
zh: “那些日子的災難剛過去： 太陽就變黑了， 月亮也不發光， 眾星從天墜落， 天上的萬象震動。

en: Then will appear in heaven the sign of the Son of Man, and then all the tribes of the earth will mourn, and they will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.
zh: “那時，人子的徵兆要顯在天上，地上的萬族都要哀號，並且看見人子帶著能力，滿有榮耀，駕著天上的雲降臨。

en: And he will send out his angels with a loud trumpet call, and they will gather his elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.
zh: 當號筒發出響聲，他要差派使者，把他的選民從四方，從天這邊到天那邊都招聚來。

en: "From the fig tree learn its lesson: as soon as its branch becomes tender and puts out its leaves, you know that summer is near.
zh: “你們應該從無花果樹學個功課：樹枝長出嫩芽生出葉子的時候，你們就知道夏天近了；

en: So also, when you see all these things, you know that he is near, at the very gates.
zh: 同樣，當你們看見這一切，就知道人子已經近在門口了。

en: Truly, I say to you, this generation will not pass away until all these things take place.
zh: 我實在告訴你們，這一切都必要發生，然後這世代才會過去。

en: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will not pass away.
zh: 天地都要過去，但我的話決不會廢去。

en: "But concerning that day and hour no one knows, not even the angels of heaven, nor the Son, but the Father only.
zh: “至於那日子和時間，沒有人知道，連天上的使者和子也不知道，只有父知道。

en: As were the days of Noah, so will be the coming of the Son of Man.
zh: 挪亞的時代怎樣，人子降臨的時候也是這樣。

en: For as in those days before the flood they were eating and drinking, marrying and giving in marriage, until the day when Noah entered the ark,
zh: 洪水之前的時代，人們吃喝嫁娶，直到挪亞進入方舟的那一天；

en: and they were unaware until the flood came and swept them all away, so will be the coming of the Son of Man.
zh: 等到洪水來到，把他們沖去，他們才明白過來；人子降臨的時候也是這樣。

en: Then two men will be in the field; one will be taken and one left.
zh: 那時，兩個人在田裡工作，一個被接去，一個撇下來；

en: Two women will be grinding at the mill; one will be taken and one left.
zh: 兩個女人在磨坊推磨，一個被接去，一個撇下來。

en: Therefore, stay awake, for you do not know on what day your Lord is coming.
zh: 因此，你們要警醒，因為不知道你們的主甚麼時候要來。

en: But know this, that if the master of the house had known in what part of the night the thief was coming, he would have stayed awake and would not have let his house be broken into.
zh: 你們都知道，家主若曉得竊賊晚上甚麼時候會來，就會提高警覺，不讓他摸進屋裡。

en: Therefore you also must be ready, for the Son of Man is coming at an hour you do not expect.
zh: 所以，你們也要準備妥當，因為在想不到的時候，人子就來了。

en: "Who then is the faithful and wise servant, whom his master has set over his household, to give them their food at the proper time?
zh: “誰是忠心和精明的僕人，被主人指派管理全家，按時分派糧食的呢？

en: Blessed is that servant whom his master will find so doing when he comes.
zh: 主人來到，看見他這樣作，那僕人就有福了。

en: Truly, I say to you, he will set him over all his possessions.
zh: 我實在告訴你們，主人要指派他管理自己的一切財產。

en: But if that wicked servant says to himself, 'My master is delayed,'
zh: 如果他是個壞的僕人，心裡說‘我的主人不會那麼快回來’，

en: and begins to beat his fellow servants and eats and drinks with drunkards,
zh: 就動手打其他的僕人，又和醉酒的人吃喝。

en: the master of that servant will come on a day when he does not expect him and at an hour he does not know
zh: 在他想不到的日子，不知道的時間，那僕人的主人要來，

en: and will cut him in pieces and put him with the hypocrites. In that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
zh: 嚴厲地處罰他，使他和虛偽的人同在一起；在那裡必要哀哭切齒。”
